headline: SpaceX Threat Wipes Out $43B in Market Value From ‘Big Three’ Telecoms—And the Pain May Not Be Over
summary: The SpaceX phone rout might be coming to an end for shares of the three largest U.S. cellular service providers, but there may still be more pain on the way for Verizon Communications, AT&T, and T-Mobile.

headline: SpaceX's Next Big Bet: Your Phone Bill?
summary: Reusable rockets. Starlink beaming internet from orbit. Orbital data centers.

headline: Charter Communications: Primed For Merger, With The Leverage To Get A Good Price (Rating Upgrade)

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Charter Communications, Lowers Price Target to $200
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Jessica Ehrlich   maintains Charter Communications (NASDAQ:CHTR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $250 to $200.
